sections.paragraph:
once קֹודֶשׁ Dan 11:30 with suff. קָדְשִׁי plur. קָֽדָשִׁים (kǒdגdhמm), with art. and pref. הַקֳּדָשִׁים, בַּקֳדָשִׁים Lev 22:4 לַקֳּדָשִׁים Neh 10:34 but with suff. קָֽדָשַׁי Eze 22:8 קָֽדָשָׁיו 2Ch 15:18 (comp. Ewald, Gramm. Crit., p. 335), and קֳדָשָׁיו Num 5:10, m.

(1) holiness, Psa 60:8 89:36 Amo 4:2. Often added to another noun in the gen. instead of an adj., as שֵׁם קָדְשִׁי my holy name, Lev 20:3 22:2 הַר קָדְשִׁי Psa 2:6 Isa 11:9 שֶׁמֶן קָדְשִׁי Psa 89:21 בִּגְדֵי קֹדֶשׁ holy garments, Exo 28:2, Exo 28:4רוּחַ קָדְשְׁךָ thy holy Spirit, Psa 51:13 אַבְנֵי קֹדֶשׁ Lam 4:1, holy gems, an image of the nobles of the people, with an allusion to the breast-plate of the high priest.

(2) concr. what is holy, a holy thing. Lev 12:4 21:6 , וְהָיוּ קֹדֶשׁ “and let (the priests) be holy,” Jer 2:3 a thing consecrated to God, especially in pl. הַקֳּדשִׁים Lev 21:22 22:2 , Lev 22:3, 15 Lev 22:15. בֶּסֶף הַקֳּדָשִׁים silver consecrated in the temple, 1Ch 26:20.

(3) a sanctuary; used of the holy tabernacle, Exo 28:43 29:30 35:19 39:1 and the temple, Psa 20:3 Dan 8:14 specially of the body of the temple, elsewhere called הֵיכָל 1Ki 8:8 2Ch 29:7 once used of the innermost part, for קֹדֶשׁ קָֽדָשִׁים Eze 41:23.

קֹדֶשׁ קָֽדָשִׁים-(a) a most holy thing, as the ark, the holy vessels, sacred oblations, etc., Exo 29:37. Plur. קָדְשֵׁי הַקֳּדָשִׁים id., Lev 21:22 2Ch 31:14 Eze 42:13 44:13 .-(b) the innermost part of the temple, i.q. דְּבִיר Exo 26:33, 34 Exo 26:34fully בֵּית קֹדֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁים 2Ch 3:8, 10 2Ch 3:10.
